ddls:
CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency (e.g., Bitcoin) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency (e.g., BTC) */,
  "logo" TEXT /* Logo of the cryptocurrency */,
  "official_website" TEXT /* Official website of the cryptocurrency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Launch date of the cryptocurrency */,
  "blockchain" TEXT /* Blockchain platform used by the cryptocurrency */,
  "consensusalgorithm" TEXT /* Consensus algorithm used by the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change in price */,
  "market_capitalization" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "circulating_supply" REAL /* Circulating supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the price entry */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the cryptocurrency */,
  "high" REAL /* High price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "low" REAL /* Low price of the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_prices" (
  "historical_price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical price entry */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price entry */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the cryptocurrency on that date */,
  "high" REAL /* High price of the cryptocurrency on that date */,
  "low" REAL /* Low price of the cryptocurrency on that date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the cryptocurrency on that date */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the cryptocurrency on that date */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change in price on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_prices_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_cap_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., large-cap, mid-cap) */,
  "min_market_cap" REAL /* Minimum market capitalization for the category */,
  "max_market_cap" REAL /* Maximum market capitalization for the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currency_market_cap_categories" (
  "currency_market_cap_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency-market cap category entry */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market capitalization category */,
  "market_capitalization" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency in that category */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the market capitalization entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_market_cap_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_currency_market_cap_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES market_cap_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_currency_market_cap_categories_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, general user) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email_verified" INTEGER /* Email verification status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_currency_watchlist" (
  "user_currency_watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-currency watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency in the watchlist */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the watchlist entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_currency_watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_currency_watchlist_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_currency_watchlist_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "activity_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., view currency, update watchlist) */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currency_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency being rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the cryptocurrency (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the rating entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_currency_ratings_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_currency_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currency_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency being reviewed */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review of the cryptocurrency */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the review entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_currency_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_currency_reviews_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currency_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency being tagged */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag for the cryptocurrency (e.g., 'deflationary', 'community-driven') */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the tag entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_currency_tags_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currency_socials" (
  "social_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media link */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media platform (e.g., Twitter, Reddit) */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the social media page */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the social media entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_currency_socials_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)
